statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); usage=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.current_usage'); total_in=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.total_input_tokens'); total_out=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.total_output_tokens'); if [ "$usage" != "null" ]; then current=$(echo "$usage" | jq '.input_tokens + .cache_creation_input_tokens + .cache_read_input_tokens'); size=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.context_window_size'); pct=$((current * 100 / size)); bar_width=20; filled=$((pct * bar_width / 100)); empty=$((bar_width - filled)); bar="["; for ((i=0; i<filled; i++)); do bar+="="; done; for ((i=0; i<empty; i++)); do bar+=" "; done; bar+="]"; printf "%s %s %3d%% | Tokens: %dk in / %dk out" "$model" "$bar" "$pct" "$((total_in / 1000))" "$((total_out / 1000))"; else printf "%s [                    ]   0%% | Tokens: 0k in / 0k out" "$model"; fi
